audit_items.proof_trace: Neither function in crc32.h performs any dynamic memory allocation (no kmalloc, kzalloc, vmalloc, or equivalent calls). crc32_posix_end uses only a stack-local u8 variable and value-type parameters; crc32_posix receives a caller-owned const pointer without taking ownership. The property holds vacuously: the universal quantifier ranges over an empty set of allocations.
